title: aconitum × schneebergense
intro: Aconitum × schneebergense is a hybrid plant species, resulting from the cross between Aconitum variegatum and Aconitum vulparia, commonly known as Monk's Hood or Wolf's Bane. It is known for its toxic properties, but it also possesses medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of aconitine, a powerful alkaloid. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including pain relief, fever reduction, and rheumatic complaints, as well as to calm the nervous system and promote relaxation. Traditionally, herbal preparations of Aconitum × schneebergense include tinctures, infusions, and decoctions, but due to its toxicity, caution and expertise are essential when handling and using the plant.
